fault_hypothesis: The counter capping logic is incorrect on line 60. When an updated counter exceeds the cap, it is set to `cap - 1` instead of being clamped to the cap value itself.

constraints.intent: The capped value should be exactly the cap, not less.
After the counter exceeds the cap, its value should be clamped to the cap.

spec.expr: cap is None or ((updated__1 <= cap and updated__3 == updated__1) or (updated__1 > cap and updated__3 == cap))

constraints.intent: The value after the capping logic must correctly reflect either the incremented value or the cap itself.
